<•#•> NARATIVE TUTORIAL ! ~°○°~
Here you have a quick and eazy tip how to improve all the messages. Remeber to crate naretive instead of descpription of an place. By that way you can creat more natural behaviour out of the characters and better respounse

Remember also to make dull respounces instead of just your character dialog, if you add actions, moves of your hand or pose it could give much more personality then just bland text !
